stemHtml: Which statement about minimum control speed is correct?

options.a: Crosswind is taken into account to determine V<sub>MCG</sub>.
options.b: V<sub>MCL</sub> is determined by maximum rudder only.
options.c: V<sub>MCA</sub> depends on the airport density altitude, and the location of the engine on the aeroplane (aft fuselage or wing).
options.d: The nose wheel steering control may be used to determine V<sub>MCG</sub>.
